task_completion.description: Open the blood donation tracker spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is open displaying the donor records, which include columns for donation type and last donation date.

task_completion.description: Calculate and update next eligible dates for Whole Blood and Platelets donors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Next Eligible Date' (or similar) column is filled in for Whole Blood and Platelets donors. The date for Whole Blood must be exactly 56 days after the last donation date. The date for Platelets must be exactly 7 days after.

task_completion.description: Calculate and update next eligible dates for Plasma and Double Red Cells donors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Next Eligible Date' (or similar) column is filled in for Plasma and Double Red Cells donors. The date for Plasma must be exactly 28 days after the last donation date. The date for Double Red Cells must be exactly 112 days after.
All 8 donor records in the spreadsheet have a calculated date entered in the target column for the next eligible donation.
The spreadsheet is saved, indicated by the agent clicking the 'Save' button, using a save shortcut, or the disappearance of the unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk in the title bar).

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to view and edit the spreadsheet
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a spreadsheet GUI (like LibreOffice Calc) rather than using terminal commands or Python scripts to modify the file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a plain text editor to modify the spreadsheet file
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is opened in a proper spreadsheet application, not a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) viewing raw XML/ODF data.
The agent is seen either typing the calculated dates, using spreadsheet date formulas (e.g., =B2+56), or using a calendar tool, rather than pasting a pre-computed list from an external script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: To verify correctness, use these exact waiting periods: Whole Blood = 56 days, Platelets = 7 days, Plasma = 28 days, Double Red Cells = 112 days. There are exactly 8 synthetic donor records that need to be updated in the spreadsheet.
